content: Remote OK Videographer and Content Creator Lean Marketing <p><strong>This is not a typical job ad, because this is not a typical company. Read this carefully.<br><br></strong>We are Lean Marketing, home of the 1-Page Marketing Plan. We are a high-intensity, high-performance team founded by bestselling author Allan Dib. We're direct, we're passionate, and we're looking for A-Players who are hungry to build something significant.</p><p>We have a proven business and audiences who already trust our brand. Now we need someone exceptional to build our content engine from the ground up.<br><br><strong>Location:</strong> Gold Coast (Hybrid - Remote with in-person shoots)<br><strong>Type:</strong> Full-time<br><strong>Compensation:</strong>Â AUD $80,000 - $110,000 depending on experience<br><br><strong>Your Mission: Build Our Content Foundation</strong></p><p>This isn't just a videography job. You will be the founding creative who architects our entire content systemâtransforming business strategy into compelling content that drives reach, trust, and inbound demand.</p><p>You'll start hands-on: filming, editing, creating. But you'll be trained to think strategically, build systematically, and become the head of content for a proven, high-performance brand.<br>Â </p><p><strong>What You'll Be Doing:</strong></p><ul><li>Weekly shoots to capture short &amp; long form content, including in-studio podcasts,Â YouTube videos, and reels</li><li>Research winning concepts and build world-class content frameworks that we'll scale across our brand</li><li>Create and establish brand channels with repeatable content systems built from the ground up</li><li>Pioneer strategic ideas for hooks, visuals, content stacks, and platform-specific growth</li><li>Work directly with our business frameworks to develop our content methodology and evolve into our head of content</li><li>Paid travel withinÂ Australia, and to theÂ USÂ and Europe annually, documenting our high-impact events and capturing behind-the-scenes content</li></ul><p><strong>Who We're Looking For (Are You One of Us?):</strong></p><p>You're a creative or freelancer who wants a long-term opportunity as part of a business making real impact. You're obsessed with self-development, marketing &amp; content, have experience filming/editing and growing content channels, and want to grow more strategically. You crave mentorship, growth, and a clear path to level up.</p><p><br>You're also:</p><ul><li><strong>An A-Player:</strong> You are ambitious, relentlessly coachable, and act like you're building your own media empire. You get annoyed by teammates who donât match your pace</li><li><strong>A Strategic Creator</strong>: You don't just make pretty videosâyou understand how content drives business results and want to build systems that scale</li><li><strong>A Problem Solver</strong>: You believe in "Fix It Twice"âcuring the disease, not just treating the symptom.Â </li><li><strong>Tech-Fluent:</strong> You are comfortable with modern content tools, publishing systems, and analytics platforms</li><li><strong>Genuinely Passionate</strong>: You care deeply about audience transformation and have a fire for self-development and marketing mastery</li></ul><p>Bonus if you have created/edited content for entrepreneurs &amp; business owners or have ideas constantly and are looking for the right outlet.</p><p><strong>Why Work With Us:</strong></p><ul><li><strong>Premium Brand Building</strong>: Deep involvement in building a high-performance personal brand</li><li><strong>Complete Creative Ownership</strong>: Full ownership over content outcomes with a clear growth pathway to become creative director</li><li><strong>Behind-The-Scenes Access</strong>: Exposure to real client transformations, high performance events, and exclusive content gold</li><li><strong>Creative Freedom</strong>: Flexibility, creative input, and growth-based incentives</li><li><strong>Uncapped Growth Potential</strong>: We offer a competitive base salary plus the opportunity to grow with a quickly scaling business. Your success is in your hands</li><li><strong>Work Hard, Play Harder</strong>: We offer 38 days of total time off per year (covering both annual leave and public holidays) with 100% remote flexibility because we believe in balancing intense work with deep rest</li></ul><p></p><p><strong>How to Apply</strong></p><p>No resumes required. Send us:</p><ol><li>A 1-minute video introducing yourself and why this opportunity excites you</li><li>Your content portfolio (Instagram, Drive, YouTube, etc)</li><li>Your favourite business and education creator, and why you rate their content</li></ol><p><strong>Subject Line:</strong> <em>Videographer - [Your Name]<br></em>Send to: Anna@leanmarketing.com</p><p>We're not hiring another camera person. We're investing in someone who's ready to build, grow, and become the architect of our content future.</p><p>If you're done with small gigs and want the role that transforms you from creator to content leaderâ Apply now.</p><p></p> sys admin, architecture, marketing Gold Coast, Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia 2026-05-25T06:00:00+00:00 1132239 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-videographer-and-content-creator-lean-marketing-1132239 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Sensing PT Indofood CBP Sukses Makmur Tbk - Noodle Division Persyaratan Pekerjaan<br><br><ul><li>Pendidikan minimal Sarjana (S1) atau lebih tinggi di bidang Kehutanan, Geografi, Teknik Elektro, Teknik Geodesi, Ilmu Lingkungan, atau bidang terkait</li><li>Memiliki keahlian dalam teknologi dan metode penginderaan jauh, dengan pengalaman kerja relevan minimal 1 tahun</li><li>Menguasai perangkat lunak terkait seperti ENVI, ERDAS, Mission Planner, dan QGIS</li><li>Memiliki pengalaman yang terbukti dalam merancang, mengimplementasikan, dan memantau program penginderaan jauh</li><li>Memiliki kemampuan analisis yang kuat serta mampu mengomunikasikan informasi teknis yang kompleks kepada pemangku kepentingan, baik teknis maupun non-teknis</li><li>Memiliki keterampilan interpersonal yang baik, dengan rekam jejak bekerja secara efektif dalam tim</li><li>Memiliki pengalaman di industri perkebunan kelapa sawit atau karet menjadi nilai tambah</li><li>Bersedia melakukan perjalanan dinas ke lokasi kerja (site)</li><li>Mampu berbahasa Inggris dan Bahasa Indonesia, baik lisan maupun tulisan dengan baik<br><br></li></ul>Deskripsi Pekerjaan<br><br><ul><li>Mengelola program penginderaan jauh untuk mendukung praktik keberlanjutan perusahaan</li><li>Merancang, mengimplementasikan, dan memonitor program penginderaan jauh secara end-to-end</li><li>Mengelola serta menganalisis data penginderaan jauh sebagai dasar pengambilan keputusan</li><li>Berkolaborasi lintas departemen untuk mengintegrasikan data ke dalam strategi bisnis dan sustainability</
